source_jobs.title: 🎵 Client Partner - Spotify Ads Sales
source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to join our digital revolution journey? 
 
At Aleph, we’re not just part of the digital advertising landscape—we’re shaping its future. Representing the world’s leading platforms, including TikTok, Amazon, Google, and nearly 55 others, we operate in 130+ markets across new and existing geographies.
 
Our mission is to empower advertisers and brands to unlock the full potential of these platforms' advertising capabilities. By fostering long-lasting partnerships, we create limitless opportunities for people and businesses to advertise effectively at both local and global levels.
 
With a presence spanning continents, Aleph offers you the chance to be part of a fast-growing, innovative team where your work makes a direct impact. If you’re ambitious, forward-thinking, and eager to thrive in a dynamic, global environment, Aleph is the perfect place to build your career.


As a Client Partner you will be responsible for building and growing Spotify’s business in the Greater China market with special focus on Export and Cross Border opportunities.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Microsoft Advertising
source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to join our digital revolution journey? 
 
At Aleph, we’re not just part of the digital advertising landscape—we’re shaping its future. Representing the world’s leading platforms, including TikTok, Amazon, Google, and nearly 55 others, we operate in 130+ markets across new and existing geographies.
 
Our mission is to empower advertisers and brands to unlock the full potential of these platforms' advertising capabilities. By fostering long-lasting partnerships, we create limitless opportunities for people and businesses to advertise effectively at both local and global levels.
 
With a presence spanning continents, Aleph offers you the chance to be part of a fast-growing, innovative team where your work makes a direct impact. If you’re ambitious, forward-thinking, and eager to thrive in a dynamic, global environment, Aleph is the perfect place to build your career.


As a member of our sales team, you’ll play a vital role in driving revenue growth. Your focus will be on strategic client engagement and acquisition.
 
Main responsibilities:
 
-Identifying and acquiring potential clients for Microsoft Advertising in Mexico
-Designing and presenting consultative proposals that align with client goals and industry trends
-Building deep trust-based relationships with clients, acting as their advisor and advocate within Microsoft Advertising
-Leveraging performance data and insights to identify opportunities
-Preparing and presenting performance reports, insights, and growth forecasts to internal and external stakeholders
 
 
Qualifications:
 
-Minimum 4 years of experience in online advertising, media sales, business development or marketing
-Proven track record of reaching and exceeding sales goals
-Deep market knowledge and strong industry connections
 
 
Digital Marketing Expertise:
 
-Experience working with performance advertisers with a deep understanding of their challenges
-Experience managing and optimizing performance campaigns is desirable (ROAS, CPA, CPL)
-Familiarity with attribution models, A/B testing,and tracking technologies (pixels, SDKs, MMPs, etc.) is desirable and useful for client acquisition
 
 
Consultative Skills:
 
-Excellent communication and relationship-building abilities 
-Strategic mindset with commercial acumen and a client-first approach
-Strong problem-solving capabilities with a continuous learning attitude
-Analytical rigor and attention to detail
 
 
Languages:
 
-Fluent English (required)
 
 
Tools:
 
-Required: Excel, Google Sheets, PowerPoint, Google Slides, Copilot/Gemini/ChatGPT
-Desirable: Salesforce, Google Analytics

We are looking for an AI & Process Optimization Intern to support our Spotify LATAM team. In this role, you will identify, design, and implement practical AI and process optimization solutions that reduce manual work, improve team efficiency, and facilitate the adoption of Aleph’s available tools.

The role will progressively make you a point of reference for tools such as Salesforce, N8N, Claude, Gemini, internal dashboards, and other solutions available within Aleph. You will learn how these tools work, understand their main use cases, and help the commercial team resolve questions and use them more effectively.

source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to join our digital revolution journey? 
 
At Aleph, we’re not just part of the digital advertising landscape—we’re shaping its future. Representing the world’s leading platforms, including TikTok, Amazon, Google, and nearly 55 others, we operate in 130+ markets across new and existing geographies.

Driving Revenue Growth & Strategic Client Expansion
As a Client Partner for Tik Tok and Pinterest, you will play a key role in driving commercial growth and expanding Aleph’s footprint in Croatia for Tik Tok and Pinterest, directly contributing to revenue generation, portfolio expansion, and long-term strategic client partnerships.
This is a revenue-driven, commercially focused role responsible for owning a book of business, identifying new growth opportunities, and positioning Aleph as a strategic partner within the digital advertising ecosystem.
About Aleph
Aleph is a global leader in digital advertising and fintech, operating across 130+ high-growth markets. We provide the bridge between 55+ of the world’s leading digital platforms and local businesses, combining global scale with deep local execution. With 90+ offices worldwide, we empower our sales teams to drive growth through exclusive partnerships and localized expertise.
✨ Why Build Your Career at Aleph
At Aleph, your work has real impact. You’ll join a fast-growing, innovative, and collaborative team that encourages initiative, creativity, and ownership.
Here’s what makes Aleph unique:
🌍 Global exposure – collaborate with colleagues and clients across multiple countries.
💡 Creative culture – bring bold ideas, test new approaches, and shape strategies.
📈 Career growth – move across teams, take on new responsibilities, and expand your expertise.
🏢 Flexible work culture – we offer flexibility to balance focus and collaboration.
🎁 Well-being & growth – enjoy a benefits package designed to support your personal development and overall quality of life

✨ Why Build Your Career at Aleph
At Aleph, your work has real impact. You’ll join a fast-growing, innovative, and collaborative team that encourages initiative, creativity, and ownership.
Here’s what makes Aleph unique:
🌍 Global exposure – collaborate with colleagues and clients across multiple countries.
💡 Creative culture – bring bold ideas, test new approaches, and shape strategies.
📈 Career growth – move across teams, take on new responsibilities, and expand your expertise.
🏢 Flexible work culture – we offer flexibility to balance focus and collaboration.
🎁 Well-being & growth – enjoy a benefits package designed to support your personal development and overall quality of life

source_jobs.title: Client Partner Snapchat - South Korea
source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to join our digital revolution journey? 
 
At Aleph, we’re not just part of the digital advertising landscape—we’re shaping its future. Representing the world’s leading platforms, including TikTok, Amazon, Google, and nearly 55 others, we operate in 130+ markets across new and existing geographies.
 
Our mission is to empower advertisers and brands to unlock the full potential of these platforms' advertising capabilities. By fostering long-lasting partnerships, we create limitless opportunities for people and businesses to advertise effectively at both local and global levels.
 
With a presence spanning continents, Aleph offers you the chance to be part of a fast-growing, innovative team where your work makes a direct impact. If you’re ambitious, forward-thinking, and eager to thrive in a dynamic, global environment, Aleph is the perfect place to build your career.


We are seeking a Client Partner for Snapchat in South Korea to lead strategic partnerships with top brands and agencies. You will own client relationships end to end, identify growth opportunities, and help advertisers achieve measurable results through innovative, data-led Snapchat campaigns.
 
If you’re passionate about building impactful client partnerships and driving growth on Snapchat, apply now and be part of our journey in South Korea.

source_jobs.title: Client Partner X
source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to join our digital revolution journey? 
 
At Aleph, we’re not just part of the digital advertising landscape—we’re shaping its future. Representing the world’s leading platforms, including TikTok, Amazon, Google, and nearly 55 others, we operate in 130+ markets across new and existing geographies.
 
Our mission is to empower advertisers and brands to unlock the full potential of these platforms' advertising capabilities. By fostering long-lasting partnerships, we create limitless opportunities for people and businesses to advertise effectively at both local and global levels.
 
With a presence spanning continents, Aleph offers you the chance to be part of a fast-growing, innovative team where your work makes a direct impact. If you’re ambitious, forward-thinking, and eager to thrive in a dynamic, global environment, Aleph is the perfect place to build your career.


About the role
The Client Partner is responsible for driving advertising revenue growth by owning a portfolio of advertisers and/or agencies, building relationships with senior stakeholders, and delivering consultative, insight-led solutions that help clients achieve brand and performance outcomes on X. The role blends new business growth and account expansion, campaign strategy, and cross-functional leadership to deliver measurable results.
This is a frontline, growth-oriented role in a reseller market where X owns the territory end to end. The focus is firmly on hunting new business across the SMB and mid-market segment — expanding the long tail, driving new activations, and increasing active clients — rather than purely farming an existing book. The role covers the North India market only (New Delhi and Gurugram).

notes: Aleph is a global leader in digital advertising and fintech, with a strong focus on sales and client partnerships.
